name: Appetizers- Ham Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 3 Packages Pepperidge Farm Party Rolls, sliced in half
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the softened margarine, chopped onion, prepared mustard, and poppy seeds.
2. Spread the mixture evenly on top of one side of each roll half.
3. Place the ham slices on top of the spread mixture.
4. Fold the other sides over to enclose the filling completely.
5. Place the assembled rolls in a baking dish.
6. Bake for 10 minutes at 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
